name: 3' Pre-Lit Potted Flocked and Glittered Norfolk Artificial Christmas Tree - Wondershop™
description:
Liven up your holiday decor with this Christmas Pre-Lit Potted Flocked Glittered Tree from Wondershop™. This artificial Christmas tree features faux flocked Norfolk branches for a realistic look and wintry charm, while white LED bulbs with constant lighting add festive ambiance. Plus, this faux Christmas tree is housed in a round white pot for easy placement on your floor or tabletop.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
